name: PersGuard: Preventing Malicious Personalization in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models via Model Backdoors

description: arXiv:2502.16167v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have advanced text-to-image (T2I) synthesis, yet their personalization capabilities raise serious privacy and copyright concerns. Malicious actors can misuse these models to generate unauthorized portraits or artistic style replicas. Existing proactive defenses primarily rely on applying adversarial perturbations t...
author: Xinwei Liu, Xiaojun Jia, Yuan Xun, Hua Zhang, Xiaochun Cao
